title: Board Resolution Extraction Automation for Corporate Governance
metaTitle: Board Resolution Extraction Automation | Corporate Governance
metaDescription: Extract voting records, decisions, and action items from board meeting minutes automatically. Convert PDF minutes to structured spreadsheets.
h1: Board Resolution Extraction Automation for Corporate Governance

hero.headline: Extract Board Resolutions and Decisions Automatically
hero.subheadline: Convert board meeting minutes to structured spreadsheets with voting records, action items, and compliance data extracted using AI

summary: Board resolution extraction automation converts PDF board meeting minutes into structured Excel spreadsheets, extracting voting records, resolutions, action items, and decision data for corporate governance tracking and compliance reporting.
whenThisIsRelevant: Processing monthly or quarterly board meeting minutes
Creating searchable databases of board decisions and voting records
supportedInputs: PDF board meeting minutes (digital or scanned)
Corporate resolution documents in PDF format
expectedOutputs: Excel spreadsheets with extracted resolution data
CSV files containing voting records and decision details
commonChallenges: Manual transcription of resolution numbers and voting outcomes from lengthy meeting minutes
Inconsistent formatting across different board meeting documentation
Time-consuming extraction of action items and deadlines from narrative meeting notes
Difficulty tracking resolution status and implementation across multiple board meetings
howItWorksSteps: Upload PDF board meeting minutes or scanned resolution documents
AI identifies and extracts resolution numbers, voting outcomes, and action items
Review extracted data including motion details, voting records, and decision dates
Export structured spreadsheet with governance data ready for compliance tracking
whyPdfExcelAiFits: Handles both typed meeting minutes and scanned board documents with OCR technology
Batch processing enables efficient handling of multiple meeting minutes at once
Custom field extraction allows targeting specific governance elements like resolution numbers and vote counts
99%+ accuracy on clear meeting minutes reduces manual review time significantly
limitations: Complex multi-page resolutions with nested voting procedures may require manual review
Handwritten notes or amendments in meeting margins have limited recognition accuracy
Very old or poor-quality scanned minutes may need document quality improvement

faq.question: Can this extract specific voting tallies and dissenting opinions from board minutes?
faq.answer: Yes, the AI can identify and extract voting counts, individual director votes, and dissenting opinions when clearly documented in the meeting minutes format.

faq.question: Does this work with different board meeting minute formats and templates?
faq.answer: The system handles various meeting minute formats, though non-standard layouts may require custom field configuration for optimal extraction accuracy.

faq.question: How does this handle confidential or redacted board information?
faq.answer: Files are encrypted during processing and automatically deleted afterward, though heavily redacted documents may have missing fields in the extracted data.

faq.question: Can I process multiple board meetings from different time periods together?
faq.answer: Yes, batch processing allows you to upload multiple meeting minutes files simultaneously, with each document creating a separate row in the output spreadsheet.

trustSignals: Files encrypted and deleted after processing for confidentiality
Free trial available to test with your board minutes
Batch processing handles multiple meetings efficiently
exampleUseCases: Public company extracting quarterly board resolutions for SEC compliance reporting
Private corporation tracking action items and implementation deadlines from board decisions
Legal department creating searchable database of historical board voting records
Corporate secretary preparing annual governance summary with extracted resolution data
